title: Create an Ingress Resource
description:
## Create an Ingress Resource

Ingress exposes HTTP/HTTPS routes from outside the cluster to services within it. k3s includes Traefik as its default Ingress controller.

**Your task:**

A deployment `web-app` and service `web-svc` (port 80) already exist. Create an **Ingress** named `web-ingress` that:
- Routes traffic for host `app.lab.local`
- Path `/` → service `web-svc` on port `80`
- Uses `pathType: Prefix`

hints.title: Ingress manifest
hints.body: Use `networking.k8s.io/v1` for the Ingress API. Define `spec.rules[].host` and `spec.rules[].http.paths[]`.
hints.command:
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: web-ingress
spec:
  rules:
  - host: app.lab.local
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: web-svc
            port:
              number: 80
EOF
